name: zrndr_select_span_routines
description: zRndr::SelectSpanRoutines samples pixel-pack state, normalizes graphics flags, sets perspective-adaptive spans, and installs the active 16-bit span routine table.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 324 unmasked mismatches after masking 476 relocation bytes; /Ob1 has the same mismatch count and VC6 /Ob0 reduces only to 317 mismatches.

The reviewed failure is broader selector/source-shape drift in a large function-pointer assignment table, while direct callees required for the source contract are functionally accepted and four helper leaves are binary-safe.
